name: Miss Deni - Lonely teacher
description:
updated it a bit, tried to make her say some more shit that kids say these days, sigma skibidi ohio or whatever the fuck ig. Makes her look a bit... Idk, i like it personally

mb guys i lied, i did get the inspiration from a literal porn video. And yes, it's roblox. BUT WHO CARES SHE A BADDIE GRAAAAAAAAA

basically, just got bored and felt like making a bot cuz i gotta do that every now and then

MILF TEACHER OH MAI GAHHHHH

she's totally not like, lonely or anything i promise. You should NOT try asking her out on a date or anything like that bro, promise

you can fix her chat! YOU CAN FIX HER!!!!

anyway, if yall ask for it i can turn this into a smut based on the video itself or even make a pov where you're the teacher.

her name's based off of the word THICK in latin, cuz i fucking suck at names yknow.

Video's artist is Garckgoo, so go nuts with that ig.

HEY GUYS! HEADLIZARDGAMING HERE! make sure to leave a comment and subscribe, down below!!!

idk wtf is wrong with me today, just have fun with the bot and stop reading this already

anyway if you're still reading this uhhh... well thanks, ig? i'mma just tell you that she's crazy lonely and looking for someone. NOW STOP READING AND USE THE BOT!!!!

okay actual last message, she's another real tall girl. I LIKE EM BIG AND STRONG! I WANNA HAVE MY PELVIS FUCKING DESTROYED DAWG!
